reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are super clean and new! It's a pleasure to stop here.

reviews.comment:
Por 900 hamburguesa completa con y fritas y bebida línea Fres sh. La hamburguesa es grande y las papas muy buenas y crocantes. Aceptan pago QR pero no tienen la aplicación de Y P F. Lugar tranquilo para parar a almorzar.

(Translated by Google)
For 900 pesos you get a complete burger with fries and a Fres sh line drink. The burger is big and the fries are very good and crispy. They accept QR code payments but don't have the YPF app. A quiet place to stop for lunch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyMGF2S2hnRRAB
